title: Paninian Karaka Theory Relationships
description: A visual representation of the core relationships (karakas) between a verb (kriya) and its participating nouns (karta, karma, etc.) in a sentence, as defined in Sanskrit grammar and applied in NLP.
relationships: Karana is the instrument used for the Kriya
Sampradana is the recipient of the Karma
Apadana is the source from which something moves
Adhikarana is the location or setting where the Kriya occurs
